decision: Ticketon historical backfill is partially feasible, not yet justified for a full production backfill.
best_acquisition_source: Wayback CDX plus replayed public Ticketon detail URLs
why_not_full_now: current parser extracts zero events from all three archived JSON-LD variants
venue directory lacks several required major venues
corpus-level date, venue, duplicate and matchability rates are unmeasured
stage19b_scope: build an audit-only archive HTML normalizer separate from live parser
sample 100 deduplicated Wayback URLs stratified across 2023-2025
apply transport-relevance audit labels without deleting raw records
measure exact-date, Astana, venue, geocoding and road-match rates
only then decide on historical training ingestion
